headline: Dell Lands London Stock Exchange Cloud Role With Long-Term Investor Implications
summary: London Stock Exchange Group has entered a multi-year partnership with Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) to build a private cloud platform. The platform is intended to support LSEG's critical data, analytics, and markets operations with secure, high-performance on-premises infrastructure. The agreement focuses on hybrid and multi-cloud use cases for a highly regulated financial institution. For you as an investor, this partnership highlights NYSE:DELL as a key supplier of on-premises...
